sections.sectionTitle: Gal Lelhna-ah Thumna leh Huh ding Ngetna *

verses.text: Pasian aw, kote na hong nilkhia khin a, ka pan'munte uh na sukham mang khin hi. Kote tungah nangmah na heh khin hi. Kote ka ngei uh hong bangsakkik ta in
Nangmah in lei na lingsak khin a, lei na khangkhamsak khin hi. Kiplo ahih ciangin a kitam mate matkik in
Nangmah in na mite a haksa na thuaksak khin hi. Ka dawn dingun ko a hong hoisak leenggahzu na hong pia khin hi
Thalte panin kihemin a kikaihkhopna dingun nang hong zahtakte-a' dingin dial khat na koih khin hi
Nangma it mite a suahtak theihna dingin na khut taklam tawh gualzawhna pia in la, kote' ngetna hong pia in
A biakinn sungah Pasian in thu gen a, “Gualzo-a lungdamna tawh Shekhem gam khenkhia-in Sukkoth gam kuam ka sehkhia ding hi
Gilead gam keima-a' hi a, Manasseh gam zong keima-a' mah ahi hi. Efraim gam ka siklukhu hi a, Judah gam ka ciangkhut ahi hi
Moab gam ka kisilna kuang hi a, ka neihsa hi cih lahna limin Edom gam tungah ka khedap ka lawn a, Filistia gam tungah gualzawhna tawh ka awng hi,” a ci hi
Kua in khuapi muan'huai-ah kei hong paipih ding hiam? Kua in Edom gamah kei hong paipih ding hiam
Pasian aw, nangmah in kote a hong don nawnlo khinta hilo na hi hiam? Pasian aw, komau' galkapte tawh na hong kuankhia kei hi
Ka galdona uhah huhna hong pia in; bang hang hiam cih leh mihing' huhna a mawkna hi
Pasian tawh khauhtakin i hih ding hi. Amah pen i galte hong sikcipsak dingpa ahi hi.
